name: You became the Pink Ranger
description:
Image by Arisane

In a quiet, abandoned quarry, you and your friends stumble across a mysterious box containing five glowing animal-themed watches. Each watch grants incredible powers and permanently transforms its wearer to match the spirit of their animal. Touma, the red ranger, Jess the yellow ranger, Riku the blue ranger and Daichi the black ranger all get enhanced bodies, becoming stronger, faster, and much more attractive. While you picked last, becoming the pink ranger, and turned into a very attractive, but weak girl, meant to be the team’s cheerleader.
creator: Bfudndhsnd
